backend.changelog: Co-release with CadBridge 1.8.87 - clearer status while SolidWorks is still launching (it is no longer mislabeled 'Wrong tenant' when the tenant is actually correct).

cadBridge.changelog: Switching SolidWorks to another tenant no longer gets stuck repeating the 'Local cache is already populated ... of another component' dialog: the agent now clears just the one stale cached file each dialog names and retries the open automatically, so a whole batch of leftover files from a previous tenant clears in a single Generate (never a full-cache wipe). The tray Update button also works on more machines (it falls back to PowerShell when the elevated command prompt is blocked), and a misleading 'Wrong tenant' message no longer appears when SolidWorks is simply still starting up.
